searchQuery.title: Search query
searchQuery.description: Keyword, sector, or company name to search for (e.g. 'software', 'construction', 'accountant').

countries.title: Countries (ISO codes)
countries.description: Comma-separated ISO country codes to filter results (e.g. NL, NL,BE, DE).

maxPages.title: Max pages
maxPages.description: Maximum number of search result pages to crawl.
